raw_title: Going Local? Localized Rhetoric in Congressional Communications
title_en: Going Local? Localized Rhetoric in Congressional Communications
title_zh: 走向地方化？国会沟通中的地方化修辞
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了美国国会议员在沟通中如何使用地方化的修辞策略，比如提及当地问题或使用方言，来与选民建立联系并增强说服力。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how U.S. Congress members use localized rhetorical strategies, such as referencing local issues or using dialect, in their communications to connect with constituents and enhance persuasiveness.
research_direction_zh: 探索政治人物如何通过调整语言和内容来适应不同地区或群体的沟通需求，以提高政治传播的效果和影响力。
research_direction_en: Investigating how political figures adapt their language and content to meet the communication needs of different regions or groups, aiming to improve the effectiveness and impact of political messaging.
